props.name: animation
props.description: Set animation type to better convey the perception of something being actively loaded.

props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: lg
props.description: The number of columns on large devices (<1200px).

props.name: md
props.description: The number of columns on medium devices (<992px).

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component extra small, small, or large.

props.name: sm
props.description: The number of columns on small devices (<768px).

props.name: xl
props.description: The number of columns on X-Large devices (<1400px).

props.name: xs
props.description: The number of columns on extra small devices (<576px).

props.name: xxl
props.description: The number of columns on XX-Large devices (≥1400px).
